title: Simple Gems Fabricated
description: Adds new gems, tools and armors to the game!
body:
# Simple Gems

This is a Fabric port of [Simple Gems](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-gems), an old mod I made with MCreator

## Content

This mod currently adds Ruby, Emerald, Sapphire, and Amethyst armors and tools. Opal is planned

Weaving : Use one of those gems to gain a temporary buff!

## Disclaimer

This mod is in early development and things can break and change. 

## Others

You can find the latest build under the Actions tab on GitHub. Be aware that those might miss some features or can be bugged/broken.

This mod is licenced under the CECILL-2.1 license
